description:
secretx-systemd/src/lib.rs:71-93 validates credential names with only two checks: `name.is_empty()` and `name.contains('/')`. systemd's own validator (src/shared/creds-util.c:46 `credential_name_valid()`, which is `filename_is_valid() && fdname_is_valid()`) rejects substantially more:

  - exact strings `.` and `..` (dot_or_dot_dot)
  - any byte < 0x20 (rejects \t, \n, \r, all C0 controls; NUL is impossible in C-strings)
  - any byte >= 0x7F (rejects DEL and all non-ASCII / UTF-8)
  - the byte ':'
  - length > 255 bytes
  - empty (already covered)
  - '/' anywhere (already covered)

Triggers and bad behaviour with the current code:

  1. URI 'secretx:systemd:..' — accepted at parse time. PathBuf::join produces "$CREDENTIALS_DIRECTORY/.." which on read returns EISDIR. Mapped to SecretError::Backend with an obscure source. The correct variant is InvalidUri at construction. Confusing user-reported issue.
  2. URI 'secretx:systemd:.' — same path, same wrong variant.
  3. URI 'secretx:systemd:%01x' percent-decodes to "\x01x". Passes 'contains/' check. systemd would never produce a credential by this name, so read returns NotFound. Wrong: should be InvalidUri because the name is structurally invalid per systemd's rules.
  4. URI 'secretx:systemd:foo:bar' — `SecretUri::parse` only splits on the FIRST ':' so path="foo:bar". systemd rejects ':' in fdname_is_valid; we accept it.
  5. 256+ character names accepted; systemd rejects.

Path-traversal exposure is gated by systemd's mount-namespace setup ($CREDENTIALS_DIRECTORY is unit-private). In production the kernel's namespacing prevents data leakage. But the env-var indirection means tests, dev environments, or non-systemd hosts that set CREDENTIALS_DIRECTORY manually do not have that mitigation, and `..` walks out of the configured directory.

Fix: mirror systemd's credential_name_valid() exactly (NAME_MAX=255, reject '.', '..', '/' anywhere, bytes <0x20 or >=0x7F or ':'). Reference: https://github.com/systemd/systemd src/shared/creds-util.c:46 + src/basic/path-util.c:1162 + src/basic/fd-util.c:554. Test vectors mirror src/test/test-creds.c:76.
title: from_uri name validation does not match systemd's credential_name_valid()
